description: Implement ArtifactExporter in Charter.Core so the Category=ArtifactExporter tests pass: inline a local relative/file:// asset as a data: URI (MIME by extension) up to maxAssetBytes, confining reads to planDirectory (refuse path traversal); omit (about:blank + data-charter-export-omitted reason + data-charter-export-filename basename) an oversized/missing/traversal asset without ever leaking its local path; redact any other local/file:// reference (e.g. an ) to file:///[redacted]/; never emit the data-charter-sdk marker. Do NOT edit the tests.
